summary: A 'promise made / promise kept' post pairing two clips: raw Trump campaign-rally speech footage (with a 'TEXT TRUMP to 88022' lower-third) where he vows to invoke the Alien Enemies Act, plus a Fox News studio interview of Sec. Noem under a 'MIGRANT CRIME CRACKDOWN' chyron citing deportation statistics. Both are unstylized speech/news footage with no music-driven editing, so out of scope. (This tweet has two media parts; both are speech/news clips.)
notable_text: TEXT MICHIGAN to 88022 / TEXT TRUMP to 88022; TRUMP VANCE Make America Great Again; FOX NEWS LIVE EXCLUSIVE; MIGRANT CRIME CRACKDOWN; TRUMP ADMINISTRATION DEFENDS DEPORTATION FLIGHTS; BREAKING TONIGHT
